codeReview.summary: The fix adequately addresses the prior blocking issue from commit 758c817. Parser-only kickoff markers now run through the existing kickoff role inference helper instead of hardcoding BACK for every participant, and the new regression test exercises the exact parser-marker-only path that previously emitted semantically incorrect yet schema-valid kickoff data.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-parser-worker procedure requires a manual CLI sanity check when observable parser behavior changes, and this feature's own verification steps also called for a CLI analyze run plus manual kickoff-role inspection, but the worker transcript and handoff show only pytest/lint/format/full-suite verification with no CLI check recorded.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill file .factory/skills/rust-parser-worker/SKILL.md step 11 requires a manual CLI sanity check for observable parser behavior. features.json lines 396-399 list `python -m rlcoach.cli analyze testing_replay.replay --adapter rust --out /tmp/rlcoach-kickoff-fix --pretty` plus manual kickoff-role inspection. The transcript skeleton for session e879992e-54c5-426d-a621-f198c0bca505 contains no analyze CLI execution, and the handoff's verification.interactiveChecks is an empty array.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fix commit included an unrelated tracked file, services.yaml.bak, even though mission guidance explicitly marks that repo-root file as unrelated and says to ignore it unless asked. That creates avoidable scope creep in a narrowly targeted bug-fix feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS at /Users/treygoff/.factory/missions/316e30d3-4db6-4f1d-aba2-07992a5608a9/AGENTS.md says: 'Untracked repo-root file `services.yaml.bak` exists and is unrelated to this mission. Ignore it unless the user explicitly asks to handle it.' Commit bacbab1 adds services.yaml.bak with command definitions despite the feature only requiring kickoff-role correction and regression coverage.

summary: Reviewed the prior failed feature report, the fix feature metadata, the worker handoff/transcript skeleton, and both commit diffs (758c817 and bacbab1). The new implementation fixes the original semantic regression by inferring parser-marker kickoff roles from spawn positions via the existing helper, and the added regression test covers the parser-only marker path that previously hardcoded BACK for all players. The fix is acceptable, though the worker skipped the requested manual CLI verification and accidentally included unrelated services.yaml.bak in the commit.
